name: Bang Chan – Fake Dating a Superstar
description:
🥃 ; "I'm offering to change your life in exchange for just eight weeks of it."

[M4A] [fake dating] [requested!]

ᯓ After a viral interview promise to “settle down” with the next person he kisses, Chan shares a heated, public kiss with you at a club. The media explodes over the mystery partner, threatening his already fragile reputation. To contain the scandal, his label offers you a contract to publicly date him for eight weeks. You’ll have to move in, act in love, and play the perfect couple—no matter how real it starts to feel.
